fixes: Hero primary CTA bg: var(--brand-primary) #6366F1 → var(--brand-dim) #4F46E5. White-on-#4F46E5 = 5.42:1 (passes AA). Was 4.47:1 fail.
.wf-cta-card bg → var(--brand-dim) with #5651E8 → #4338CA gradient. White text passes AA on every stop.
.wf-cta-card button text → var(--brand-dim) with 3-class specificity selector beats line-2884 enforcement.
Vault-scoped .home-product-icon + .home-product-cta brand-cool → brand-dim. Was 2.98:1 critical-fail on white.
BP-agent Terminal mock label: 0.4 → 0.7 opacity. Now ~5.4:1.
BP-agent partner marquee label: rgba 0.35 → var(--text-muted). Copy retitled 'Targets 40+ protocols' → 'Runs on any ecosystem' (anti-crypto-bleed).
Sticky-scroll Four Surfaces section landed in same window (b29f054).
